summary: Backend: 17/17 pytest tests PASS (auth+JWT, AI extract EN/HI/GU, requests CRUD, approve/reject/generate-PO, PO status transitions w/ inventory update, WhatsApp send w/ bot reply, analytics dashboard, seed data). Frontend: Login redirects to Dashboard rendering all KPIs (Total Requests/Pending/Open POs/Low Stock/Total Spend), Recent Requests table, Low Stock Alerts. Requests page shows filter tabs + rows + Details. WhatsApp simulator sends message and bot reply appears; Live Extractions panel populated. Voice Intake, Vendors, Purchase Orders, Inventory, Analytics navigable via sidebar.

issues: After login user is redirected to '/' (root) which renders Dashboard. Works fine, but no explicit '/dashboard' route — minor inconsistency with naming.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~710 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, requests, po, whatsapp, analytics) for maintainability
generate_po uses fallback unit_price=350 and picks first vendor when none provided — fine for demo, but real platform should match vendor by material category
/api/requests POST accepts an unstructured Dict[str, Any] — switch to Pydantic model for stronger validation
CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True is not spec-compliant; restrict origins in production
Demo seed users only created when users collection is empty — adding any signup before seed would skip demo accounts. Consider per-email idempotent upserts.
GET /api/requests has no pagination cap besides to_list(500); fine for now
seed_data_creation: Seeded by backend on startup: 3 sites, 5 vendors, 6 materials, 4 inventory items, 2 demo users. Tests created additional TEST_ requests / 1 PO.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints verified via /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, 17 tests). Frontend login, dashboard, requests, whatsapp visually verified. Voice-recording flow intentionally skipped per instructions; sample buttons + text path validated. OPENAI_API_KEY is live and AI extraction works for EN/HI/GU.
